personality_one_liner: A calm, highly readable, and trustworthy space that puts family safety and location clarity first without feeling overly clinical or intrusive.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Cards use md/lg padding, avoiding flush-to-edge elements unless full-bleed imagery.

do's: Floating bottom tab bar must be glass (expo-blur) over the map.
Top sticky header controls (Check-in, Battery) on the map should use glass backgrounds.
dont's: Do not use glass for list rows or standard cards on non-map screens.
Do not use glass for text input fields.

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Secure entry point emphasizing family connection.

states.error: Inline text below fields using error color.

screens.layout: Top 40% uses 'onboarding_family' image with a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to surface). Bottom 60% is a solid surface card containing clean single-column inputs and a sticky brandPrimary CTA at the bottom.

screens.name: Home Map
screens.purpose: Live tracking overview of all family members.

states.loading: Skeleton map grid or spinner in the center.
states.empty: Map shows current user only with 'Invite Family' CTA.
states.error: Banner at the top: 'Unable to update location. Retry'.

screens.layout: Full-bleed map (flex: 1). Floating glass tab bar at the bottom (inset 20pt from left/right/bottom). Top safe-area features a glass header with User profile left, 'Check In' chip center, and floating SOS FAB (error color) above the tab bar.

screens.name: Family List
screens.purpose: Quick scan of member statuses (battery, location, last seen).

states.empty: Illustration + 'No members yet. Send an invite!'

screens.layout: Standard iOS list view. Each row uses surfaceSecondary, avatar on the left, Name and Status text, and a right-aligned battery indicator. Generous md padding between rows.

screens.name: Chat
screens.purpose: Real-time communication for the family circle.

states.error: Failed to send red (!) icon next to message.

screens.layout: Standard native chat. Messages from user are brandPrimary. Messages from others are surfaceTertiary. Input field fixed above keyboard with KeyboardAvoidingView.

screens.name: Places/Geofences
screens.purpose: Manage safe zones like Home or School and notification rules.
screens.layout: Grid or vertical list of large cards. Each card uses an image backdrop (place_home, place_school) with a top-to-bottom gradient scrim and white text on the bottom. CTA 'Add Place' sticky at bottom.

screens.name: Location history
screens.purpose: Timeline of a specific member's movements.
screens.layout: Vertical timeline layout. Left side has a subtle vertical line with brandPrimary dots. Right side contains surfaceSecondary cards detailing time, address, and activity (e.g., 'Driving').

screens.name: SOS Confirmation
screens.purpose: Prevent accidental triggers while ensuring emergency access.
screens.layout: Full-screen modal overlay in surfaceInverse or heavy error tint. Contains a large, oversized 'Swipe to SOS' or 'Hold to SOS' slider to avoid accidental taps. High contrast, large typography.

screens.name: Invite
screens.purpose: Easily onboard new members to the family circle.
screens.layout: Centered layout. Large QR code in the middle inside a surfaceSecondary card with heavy shadow_tier 1. Large prominent 'Share Code' CTA pinned to the bottom.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default Material or iOS blues for links, active tabs, or icons. The brand color is Sage Green.

Implement the bottom tab bar as a floating, pill-shaped 'Liquid Glass' container inset from the edges (approx 20pt) rather than a full-width bottom block. This matches the modern Find My / Life360 patterns discovered in research.
Apply gradient-to-dark scrim overlays on all image cards (e.g., Places) to ensure text readability.
For the SOS Screen, build an aggressive full-screen modal with a 'Swipe to Trigger' or 'Hold' interaction. Prevent accidental taps at all costs.
Ensure map pins use the provided avatar images wrapped in a white border with a shadow for clear map visibility.
Every sticky primary button (like 'Save' or 'Share Code') must be anchored at the bottom with proper SafeAreaView padding, avoiding content overlap.
When integrating haptics, tie 'success' to check-in completion, and 'heavy' to the SOS slider.
